# Horadric Cube — Boss Trophy Amalgamation

## Quick Answer: Does Torment Tier Matter for Amalgamation?

**No — the Torment tier you're on when you click the Amalgamation recipe does not affect the result.**

The recipe itself is fixed in inputs and outputs. But Torment matters significantly for **acquiring the trophies** in the first place.

## What the Recipe Does

> [!info] Amalgamation Recipe
> **5 identical Boss Trophies → 1 random Unique from that Lair Boss's loot table**

- Sacrifice **5 of the same Rare Boss Trophy** to acquire a random Unique from that specific Lair Boss
- The recipe **does not work with equipment**
- Conversion is the same on Torment 1 or Torment 12

## Where Torment *Does* Matter

### 1. Trophy Acquisition Is Gated by Torment

- Boss Trophies are added to the global loot pool **once you push into Torment difficulties**
- You cannot rely on random world drops at lower tiers
- Trophies have a fairly small chance of dropping from anywhere, **so long as you're in any Torment difficulty**

### 2. Greater Lair Keys & Highest-Tier Trophies Require Specific Torment

- **Greater Lair Keys** appear at **Tormented 6 and above**
- **Crooks of the False Prophet** (needed for Echo of the False Prophet boss) drops at **Tormented 10+**

So you can't farm certain trophies until you're at the right Torment tier — but once you have them in your inventory, the cube doesn't care what tier you're sitting in when you craft.

## Why Amalgamation Is Usually the *Worse* Option

Several guides actively warn that **direct boss kills are usually a better use of trophies**:

> [!warning] The math doesn't favor the Cube
> Opening Lair Boss chests does still drop Unique items, and the drop rates are higher as you climb the Torment tiers.

### Better alternative: Convert trophies to Lair Keys

Instead of gambling your trophies away at the cube, hand them over to the **Alchemist** to convert them directly into fresh Lair Keys.

Comparison for 5 trophies:

| Approach | Result |
|---|---|
| **Amalgamation** | 1 Unique roll, class-agnostic (might be unequippable) |
| **Convert to Keys → Run Bosses** | 5 Unique rolls + mountains of secondary loot, all with scaled drop rates |

When you open a Treasure Hoard, you get a massive shower of gear, gold, and materials alongside your Unique chance. As you push into the highest Torment difficulties, drop rates from those hoards **scale dramatically**.

### Cube Is Class-Agnostic

The cube does not care what class you are currently playing. It will happily take your five hard-earned trophies and hand you a weapon you cannot even equip.

## Veteran Takeaway

| Question | Answer |
|---|---|
| Amalgamation result affected by Torment? | **No** |
| Trophy farming affected by Torment? | **Yes** — push high to access pool, T6+ for Greater Keys |
| Best use of trophies? | **Convert to Keys via Alchemist** and run bosses at high Torment |

## When Amalgamation *Does* Make Sense

- You've got an overflowing stockpile of one specific trophy type
- You've already exhausted your reasonable boss-running session
- You don't want to lose the trophies to inventory pressure

In that scenario, dumping the excess into the cube is fine — you're not losing efficiency since you weren't going to run those bosses anyway.
